claim_summary: Section 07 — Mean-reversion half-life (OU AR(1)) per product/day.
raw_excerpt:
"""Section 07 — Mean-reversion half-life (OU AR(1)) per product/day."""
from __future__ import annotations

import sys
from pathlib import Path
import pandas as pd
from _common import (fmt_section_header, per_product_per_day_records, save_outputs)

sys.path.insert(0, str(Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / "autoresearch"))
from utils.stats import ou_half_life  # noqa: E402


def metric(p: str, d: int, sub: pd.DataFrame) -> dict:
    m = sub["mid"].astype(float).to_numpy()
    if len(m) < 50:
        return None
    hl = ou_half_life(m)
    is_mr = hl < 1e8 and hl > 0
    return {
        "half_life_ticks": float(hl),
        "is_mean_reverting": bool(is_mr),
    }


def main() -> pd.DataFrame:
    print(fmt_section_header("Section 07 — OU Half-Life"))
    out = per_product_per_day_record
